title: Veerangana Durgavati Tiger Reserve
description: Source: ANI Subject: Mapping Context: Madhya Pradesh Chief Minister has laid the foundation for a new soft release Boma (enclosure) at the Veerangana Durgavati Tiger Reserve (VDTR), marking the start of India’s third home for cheetahs. About Veerangana Durgavati Tiger Reserve: What it is?
